title: Block Chat
description: A simple plugin that disables chat. Easy to use.
body:
**ChatBlocker** is a lightweight and easy-to-use chat control plugin for Spigot and Paper servers. It lets you quickly enable or disable the server chat, making it perfect for staff announcements, events, or keeping things calm during busy moments.

**Features**
- **Instant toggle.** Turn the chat on or off instantly with a simple command.
- **Custom message.** Set a personalized message that players see when chat is disabled.
- **Saves your settings.** Remembers chat state and message across restarts.
- **Lightweight and efficient.** No dependencies, minimal performance impact.

**Commands:**
- ```/blockchat``` — Toggle the chat on or off.
- ```/blockchat message <text>``` — Change the message displayed when chat is disabled.

**Example:**
```
/blockchat
> Chat has been disabled!

/blockchat message Chat is currently off for maintenance!
> Disabled message has been updated!
```
